intended_use: RUS is medical imaging software that is intended to provide trained medical professionals with tools to aid them in reading, interpreting, reporting, and treatment planning for patients. RUS accepts D
intended_use_full: RUS is medical imaging software that is intended to provide trained medical professionals with tools to aid them in reading, interpreting, reporting, and treatment planning for patients. RUS accepts DICOM compliant medical images acquired from iodine contrast-enhanced abdomen CT.
target_condition: Abdominal pathology requiring surgical planning or treatment planning in iodine contrast-enhanced abdomen CT
ground_truth: Medical professional segmentations and 3D scan data from the same imaging studies for organ and vessel segmentation; validation data during model development process for pneumoperitoneum; phantom data and hu3D data for length measurements
other_metrics: Organ Segmentation: 0.927 DSC (target 0.920); Vessel Segmentation: 0.920 DSC (target 0.890); Pneumoperitoneum: ±0.972 mm MAE (target ±1.083 mm); Length Measurement: mean difference ±10% on phantom and hu3D data
